overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a modern, dimly lit corporate corridor with dark metallic walls and red carpeting. The scene features wall-mounted screens, wooden doors, and large windows on the right side allowing natural light to enter. The footage appears to be from a high-quality video game engine, likely Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern corporate corridor with red carpet and dark metallic walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor, passing wall-mounted monitors and fire safety equipment

entered.detail: dark gray metallic wall panels with vertical seams running along the left side
rectangular screen with yellow border mounted on the wall
dark wooden door with metallic handle and frame
red fire safety cabinet mounted on the wall
bright red carpet running down the center of the corridor floor
tall windows allowing bright natural light to enter from the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a sleek, modern corridor characterized by dark metallic walls and a striking red carpet. Wall-mounted monitors and fire safety equipment line the left wall while floor-to-ceiling windows on the right flood the space with natural daylight. The environment is empty and silent, emphasizing the corporate, futuristic aesthetic.

events.description: camera slows and approaches the wooden door on the left wall, preparing to interact or enter

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching a wooden door on the left side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the corridor, the camera approaches a wooden door on the left wall, moving from a mid-distance view to a close-up perspective. The wall-mounted monitor and fire extinguisher unit pass out of view behind the camera as the focus narrows to the door details and the red carpet texture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sterile corporate corridor that shifts from a wide architectural view to an intimate focus on a single doorway. It begins by gliding past dark metallic walls and a striking red carpet, with floor-to-ceiling windows on the right flooding the empty space with natural daylight. As the camera advances, the wall-mounted monitors and fire safety equipment on the left gradually slide out of frame. The perspective then narrows, transitioning from the expansive hallway to a close-up approach of a wooden door. The scene finally settles on the fine details of the door's surface and the texture of the red carpet beneath.
